name: MoneyGram
description_short: MoneyGram operates a global money transfer network with 45+ locations across Fort Worth, Texas, enabling customers to send and receive money online or in-person through partner retailers.
description_long:
MoneyGram is an international money transfer company that provides access to money sending and receiving services through a distributed network of agent locations rather than traditional brick-and-mortar branches. The company partners with established retailers including Ace Cash Express, CVS, Walmart, and independent convenience stores to offer its services at multiple locations throughout Fort Worth and beyond.

MoneyGram's core offering is money transfer functionality—allowing customers to send and receive funds domestically and internationally through partner locations. According to their Fort Worth location page, customers can "manage transfers easily, online or offline," indicating both digital and in-person transaction options. The service leverages an extensive network of retail partners with varying operating hours, from 6:00 PM to 11:00 PM in the Fort Worth area, providing accessibility across different neighborhoods and shopping patterns.

What distinguishes MoneyGram is its agent-based model rather than owned locations. By partnering with existing retailers (Ace Cash Express, CVS, Walmart, convenience stores), the company achieves wider geographic coverage with lower overhead. Customers benefit from the convenience of conducting transfers at familiar retail destinations during extended hours. The ability to manage transactions both online and offline provides flexibility for different customer preferences and situations.

However, MoneyGram's distributed model means service quality and customer experience vary significantly by partner location. Transfer fees, exchange rates, and transaction limits depend on the specific agent and may differ from location to location. While the extensive network provides access, it does not guarantee uniform service standards or competitive pricing across all 45 Fort Worth locations. Customers should compare fees and rates before committing to a transfer.
address: 717 W Berry St, Fort Worth, TX 76110

company_info.headquarters: 717 W Berry St, Fort Worth, TX 76110

pros: 45+ locations across Fort Worth providing convenient geographic coverage
Extended operating hours ranging from 6:00 PM to 11:00 PM at most locations
Partnership with major retailers (Walmart, CVS) and established financial services companies (Ace Cash Express)
Ability to manage transfers both online and offline through single account
Access at familiar retail destinations reduces barrier to use
No requirement to maintain banking relationship or credit history for basic transfers
International money transfer capability through global network
cons: Transfer fees apply and vary by location and transfer amount—costs not disclosed on location page
Service quality inconsistent across different agent partners with varying staff expertise
Exchange rates for international transfers not transparent and likely include company markup
Limited control over service—dependent on third-party retailers' staffing and policies
No physical MoneyGram branches means customer support and dispute resolution routed through partner locations
best_for: Customers sending money to family members domestically or internationally without bank accounts
Individuals needing quick cash access through money receipt at convenient retail locations
Unbanked or underbanked populations who prefer in-person transactions over digital platforms
People seeking money transfer services while shopping at partner retailers like Walmart or CVS
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers needing domestic or international money transfers with convenient access through familiar retail locations. The primary caveat is that fees, exchange rates, and service quality vary significantly across the 45 Fort Worth locations due to the agent-based model, requiring customers to compare options before initiating transfers.
services: In-person money transfer at retail agent locations
Money receipt at distributed network locations
Extended-hours access to transfer services through retail partners
